content:
Item 4.Mine Safety Disclosures.
Not Applicable.
Executive Officers of the Registrant (ages as of [DATE_TIME])
All officers listed below serve at the pleasure of the Board of Directors. None of these officers was elected pursuant to any arrangement or understanding between the officer and any other person(s).
In [DATE_TIME], Merck announced that [PERSON], chairman and chief executive officer, will retire as chief executive officer, effective [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] will continue to serve on Merck’s Board of Directors as executive chairman, for a transition period to be determined by the board. The Merck Board of Directors has unanimously elected [PERSON], Merck’s current executive vice president, global services and chief financial officer, as chief executive officer, as well as a member of the board, effective [DATE_TIME]. Mr. [PERSON] will become president of Merck, effective [DATE_TIME], at which time the Company’s operating divisions-Human Health, Animal Health, Manufacturing, and Merck Research Laboratories-will begin reporting to Mr. [PERSON].
PART II
Item 5.
